questions.question_text: Which of the following statements is true or false? a) (-3) × (-2) = -6

Which of the following statements is true or false? e) (-3) : (-3) = +1

A shopkeeper has a mixture of red sorghum flour and white sorghum flour weighing 40 kg. One type costs 1,900 Frw per kg and another costs 2,100 Frw per kg. If the mixture is sold at 2,000 Frw per kg, find the number of kg of each type.
The sum of interior angles of a regular polygon is 1440°. a) Find the number of sides of this polygon.
b) Name the polygon.
c) Find the size of the exterior angle of this regular polygon.
Order the family needs according to priority.
questions.student_answer: a). buying food - buying clothes - paying school fees - painting house

questions.question_text: How much money does the family require to meet their budget?
questions.student_answer: The required amount to meet the budget is 120,000 Frw + 100,000 Frw + 200,000 Frw + 150,000 Frw = 570,000 Frw

questions.question_text: Do they have the required amount?
questions.student_answer: They don't have enough money. He missing amount is 570,000 Frw - 500,000 Frw = 70,000 Frw
